webServer.command: npm run build && npm run preview

specs.title: should display admin login button, authorize using HMAC code, search downloads, and manage admin dashboard
should redirect unauthenticated user away from /favorites
should redirect unauthenticated user away from /downloads
should render the pricing page with plan options
should display at least one call-to-action button
should redirect unauthenticated users to login and then show empty favorites
should allow user to add and remove a movie from favorites
should load without console errors
should have a valid <title> tag
should have a meta description
should have exactly one <h1> element
should have a viewport meta tag for mobile
should render the main navigation bar
should be focusable via keyboard (Tab navigation)
should navigate to the Pricing page
all images should have alt attributes
all form inputs should have accessible labels
interactive elements should have visible focus outlines
page should paint within 3 seconds
bundle should not include obviously large un-lazy-loaded chunks
should render a 404 page for unknown routes
should switch between light and dark themes
should filter content when clicking on an OTT provider
should open movie details modal when clicking a media card
should guide a new authenticated user through CineMatch onboarding
should render a search input on the homepage
should accept typed text in the search box
should show autocomplete suggestions after typing
search box should be keyboard accessible (Enter submits)
the React app mounts without crashing
the page renders a non-empty <body>
Home (/) loads and has an <h1>
Pricing (/pricing) loads and has an <h1>
homepage renders correctly on mobile
navigation is accessible on mobile (hamburger or nav visible)
